about.heading: Dental care that is easy to book and easy to understand
about.body: Dentezz Dental Expertz serves patients around Siddharth Vihar, Indirapuram and Ghaziabad with clear appointment options, direct calling and WhatsApp enquiry support.
about.bodyTwo: Patients can review services, check the location, choose a preferred visit time and contact the clinic quickly from mobile.

screening.heading: Simple reading before booking
screening.text: Use the appointment form to choose a treatment concern, preferred date and preferred time. The clinic can confirm the final appointment over call or WhatsApp.

faqs.question: How do I request an appointment?
faqs.answer: Use the form below, choose a date and time, call the clinic, or send a WhatsApp message. The clinic can confirm the final slot directly.

faqs.question: Do you accept walk-ins?
faqs.answer: Appointments are recommended so the clinic can reserve enough time for your concern. Urgent cases should call before visiting.

faqs.question: Will treatment start during the first visit?
faqs.answer: The first visit normally focuses on understanding your concern and discussing suitable next steps. Treatment depends on the assessment and your consent.

faqs.question: What payment methods are available?
faqs.answer: Payment details should be confirmed directly with the clinic before treatment.

emergency.title: Need urgent help?
emergency.text: A strong emergency call button can turn a worried visitor into a real enquiry before they scroll away.
